intent: Decide whether creation version v_candidate replaces v_current: run both against the same eval set, compare win/regression rates, and promote through a gate — or reject with findings. The self-evolution loop, made a reviewable procedure.

state.creation_ref: string — the library creation under evaluation
state.eval_results: object — { current: {pass, fail, per_case}, candidate: {pass, fail, per_case} }
state.comparison: object — { wins, losses, ties, regressions: [case ids candidate fails that current passed] }

edges.when: candidate's eval set ⊇ current's eval set (never fewer cases than the incumbent ran)
both versions ran the full set
comparison computed; ANY regression is highlighted first
verdict == 'reject' — findings attach to the candidate for its next iteration
candidate becomes current with lineage bump; prior version retained until the new one proves itself in use

termination: promoted (with retained rollback version) or rejected (with findings); timeout at the gate rejects — an unreviewed promotion never defaults through
